    Methods in com.blackrook.gloop.opengl.gl1 with parameters of type OGLMaterial
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    OGL11Graphics.setMaterial(FaceSide faceside, OGLMaterial material)
    Sets the current material used for drawing polygons and other geometry, and will remain doing so until this is changed.
    void
    OGL11Graphics.setMaterial(OGLMaterial material)
    Sets the current material used for drawing polygons and other geometry.
